If a [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtensionController] is associated with a non-persistent configuration, no data will be written to the file system. This is useful for extensions in “private browsing” situations.

# nonPersistent()

**Type Method**

Returns a new non-persistent configuration.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor class func nonPersistent() -> Self
```

## Discussion

If a [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtensionController] is associated with a non-persistent configuration, no data will be written to the file system. This is useful for extensions in “private browsing” situations.
title: nonPersistent()
